book: THE GOSPEL ACCORDING TO ST. MATTHEW

verses.text: And it came to pass, that when Jesus had finished these sayings, he departed from Galilee, and came into the coasts of Judaea beyond Jordan;
And great multitudes followed him; and he healed them there.
¶ The Pharisees also came unto him, tempting him, and saying unto him, Is it lawful for a man to put away his wife for every cause?

And he answered and said unto them, \+w Have ye\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w read\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w he which made\+w* \+add them\+add* \+w at\+w* \+w the beginning\+w* \+w made\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w male\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w female\+w*,

\+w And\+w* \+w said\+w*, \+w For\+w* \+w this\+w* \+w cause\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w a man\+w* \+w leave\+w* \+w father\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w mother\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w shall cleave\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w wife\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w they\+w* \+w twain\+w* \+w shall be\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w flesh\+w*?

\+w Wherefore\+w* \+w they are\+w* \+w no more\+w* \+w twain\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w flesh\+w*. \+w What\+w* \+w therefore\+w* \+w God\+w* \+w hath joined together\+w*, \+w let\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w man\+w* \+w put asunder\+w*.
They say unto him, Why did Moses then command to give a writing of divorcement, and to put her away?

He saith unto them, \+w Moses\+w* \+w because\+w* \+w of the hardness of\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w hearts\+w* \+w suffered\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w to put away\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w wives\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w the beginning\+w* \+w it was\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w so\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w Whosoever\+w* \+w shall put away\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w wife\+w*, \+w except\+w* \+add it be\+add* \+w for\+w* \+w fornication\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w shall marry\+w* \+w another\+w*, \+w committeth adultery\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w whoso marrieth\+w* \+w her which is put away\+w* \+w doth commit adultery\+w*.
¶ His disciples say unto him, If the case of the man be so with his wife, it is not good to marry.
But he said unto them, \+w All\+w* \+add men\+add* \+w cannot\+w* \+w receive\+w* \+w this\+w* \+w saying\+w*, \+w save\+w* \+add they\+add* \+w to whom\+w* \+w it is given\+w*.

\+w For\+w* \+w there are\+w* \+w some\+w* \+w eunuchs\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w were\+w* \+w so\+w* \+w born\+w* \+w from\+w* \+add their\+add* \+w mother’s\+w* \+w womb\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w there are\+w* \+w some\+w* \+w eunuchs\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w were made eunuchs\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w men\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w there be\+w* \+w eunuchs\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w have made\+w* \+w themselves\+w* \+w eunuchs\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w the kingdom\+w* \+w of heaven’s\+w* \+w sake\+w*. \+w He that is able\+w* \+w to receive\+w* \+add it\+add*, \+w let him receive\+w* \+add it.\+add*
¶ Then were there brought unto him little children, that he should put his hands on them, and pray: and the disciples rebuked them.

But Jesus said, \+w Suffer\+w* \+w little children\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w forbid\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w not\+w*, \+w to come\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w me\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w of such\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w the kingdom\+w* \+w of heaven\+w*.
And he laid his hands on them, and departed thence.
¶ And, behold, one came and said unto him, Good Master, what good thing shall I do, that I may have eternal life?

And he said unto him, \+w Why\+w* \+w callest thou\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w good\+w*? \+add there is\+add* \+w none\+w* \+w good\+w* \+w but\+w* \+w one\+w*, \+add that is\+add*, \+w God\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w thou wilt\+w* \+w enter\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w life\+w*, \+w keep\+w* \+w the commandments\+w*.

He saith unto him, Which? Jesus said, Thou shalt \+w do\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w murder\+w*, Thou \+w shalt\+w* \+w not\+w* commit \+w adultery\+w*, Thou \+w shalt\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w steal\+w*, Thou \+w shalt\+w* \+w not\+w* bear false \+w witness\+w*,
\+w Honour\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w father\+w* \+w and\+w* \+add thy\+add* \+w mother\+w*: \+w and\+w*, \+w Thou shalt love\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w neighbour\+w* \+w as\+w* \+w thyself\+w*.
The young man saith unto him, All these things have I kept from my youth up: what lack I yet?

Jesus said unto him, \+w If\+w* \+w thou wilt\+w* \+w be\+w* \+w perfect\+w*, \+w go\+w* \+add and\+add* \+w sell\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w thou\+w* \+w hast\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w give\+w* \+w to the poor\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w thou shalt have\+w* \+w treasure\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w heaven\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w come\+w* \+add and\+add* \+w follow\+w* \+w me\+w*.
But when the young man heard that saying, he went away sorrowful: for he had great possessions.

¶ Then said Jesus unto his disciples, \+w Verily\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w That\+w* \+w a rich man\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w hardly\+w* \+w enter\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w the kingdom\+w* \+w of heaven\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w again\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w It is\+w* \+w easier\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w a camel\+w* \+w to go\+w* \+w through\+w* \+w the eye\+w* \+w of a needle\+w*, \+w than\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w a rich man\+w* \+w to enter\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w the kingdom\+w* \+w of God\+w*.
When his disciples heard it, they were exceedingly amazed, saying, Who then can be saved?
But Jesus beheld them, and said unto them, \+w With\+w* \+w men\+w* \+w this\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w impossible\+w*; \+w but\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w God\+w* \+w all things\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w possible\+w*.
¶ Then answered Peter and said unto him, Behold, we have forsaken all, and followed thee; what shall we have therefore?

And Jesus said unto them, \+w Verily\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w That\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w which have followed\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w in\+w* \+w the regeneration\+w* \+w when\+w* \+w the Son\+w* \+w of man\+w* \+w shall sit\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the throne\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w glory\+w*, \+w ye\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w shall sit\+w* \+w upon\+w* \+w twelve\+w* \+w thrones\+w*, \+w judging\+w* \+w the twelve\+w* \+w tribes\+w* \+w of Israel\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w every\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w that hath forsaken\+w* \+w houses\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w brethren\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w sisters\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w father\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w mother\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w wife\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w children\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w lands\+w*, \+w for\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w name’s\+w* \+w sake\+w*, \+w shall receive\+w* \+w an hundredfold\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w shall inherit\+w* \+w everlasting\+w* \+w life\+w*.
\+w But\+w* \+w many\+w* \+add that are\+add* \+w first\+w* \+w shall be\+w* \+w last\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w the last\+w* \+add shall be\+add* \+w first\+w*.
